islands.title: Genesis seed island
islands.prompt: Abstract floating seed-crystal island for a tactical strategy map, Cambium brand palette, dark green stone substrate, pale chartreuse crystalline core, topographic contour ridges, non-architectural, non-figurative, sculptural organ-like terrain, web game asset, centered origin, clean silhouette.
islands.texturePrompt: Dark Cambium green stone, pale chartreuse strata, subtle ivory contour lines, matte tactical-map material, no realistic dirt, no labels, no text.

islands.title: Taste resonance island
islands.prompt: Abstract resonance island shaped like interlocking loops and taste-memory knots, floating tactical map terrain, dark teal base, pale ivory curved forms, chartreuse signal nodes, non-architectural, non-figurative, interface-free, sculptural game-engine asset.
islands.texturePrompt: Matte dark teal substrate, ivory loop forms, chartreuse signal accents, subtle contour-map bands, clean lighting-neutral PBR texture.

islands.title: Build forge island
islands.prompt: Abstract build-forge island for an isometric tactical map, organic faceted mineral terrain, clustered crystalline artifact core, low asymmetric molten-flow ridges, dark green-black base, pale chartreuse energy seams, no arches, no windows, no stairs, non-industrial, non-architectural, non-figurative, strong readable outline.
islands.texturePrompt: Dark mineral slab, desaturated ivory plates, chartreuse artifact core, thin topographic striations, matte PBR, remove baked lighting.

islands.title: Ops loop island
islands.prompt: Abstract operating-loop island for a strategy game world map, low horizontal circular torus terrain, heartbeat ring channels embedded flush in dark substrate, chartreuse perimeter signal nodes, flattened silhouette, screenless, non-architectural, non-figurative, clean readable isometric outline.
islands.texturePrompt: Dark green tactical substrate, chartreuse loop channels, ivory edge bands, subtle telemetry-like contour texture without text.

islands.title: Cortex memory island
islands.prompt: Abstract memory-orbit island, central smooth dark sphere nested in orbital terrain rings, satellite nodes, tactical map asset, dark teal and deep violet substrate, pale chartreuse signals, non-urban, non-architectural, non-figurative, sculptural Cambium cortex organ.
islands.texturePrompt: Deep teal-violet memory material, matte sphere, chartreuse orbit accents, pale contour linework, PBR maps suitable for custom scene lighting.
